title: rubus × calopalmatus
intro: Rubus × calopalmatus, also known as a hybrid raspberry or a cross between Rubus idaeus and Rubus californicus, is a type of bramble plant that belongs to the rose family (Rosaceae). This plant is used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Rubus × calopalmatus include reducing inflammation and improving cardiovascular health, as well as providing antioxidant protection against cell damage. Herbal preparations of this plant include teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
